name: DataQualityTerms
description: Minimal vocabulary fixture for JTBD testing
content:
apiVersion: v3.1.0
kind: DataContract
id: data-quality-vocabulary-001
version: 1.0.0
name: DataQualityTerms
schema:
  - name: quality_terms
    physicalName: quality_terms
    description: Data quality vocabulary terms
    properties:
      - name: term_id
        logicalType: string
        primaryKey: true
      - name: label
        logicalType: string
        required: true
      - name: definition
        logicalType: string

terms.label: Completeness
terms.definition: The degree to which required data is present

terms.label: Accuracy
terms.definition: The degree to which data correctly represents the real-world construct
